controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-6 Digital Day/Night Humidity Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-6 Digital Day/Night Humidity Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Honeywell HCM-350, Pure Enrichment MistAire XL, Vornado EVDC300
compatible_devices.notes: Humidify mode must be selected on the controller; relay activates humidifier when RH drops below setpoint. Day and night RH setpoints independently configurable. Control range 20–90% RH, deadband 5%. Any 120V humidifier or ultrasonic fogger drawing ≤10A is plug-and-play compatible. Controller is 120V only (US market); requires step-down transformer for 230V German market.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-6 Digital Day/Night Humidity Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: hOmeLabs HME020031N 35-pint, Frigidaire FFAD3033R1, Keystone KSTAD50B
compatible_devices.notes: Dehumidify mode must be selected on the controller (mode is user-selectable — only one device type connected at a time). Relay activates dehumidifier when RH exceeds setpoint. Any 120V dehumidifier drawing ≤10A is plug-and-play compatible. Controller is 120V only.
